programmes.show_description: Songs you may have forgotten from artists you'll certainly know!
Loads of your favourite hits during the 00s were just cover versions of old songs for acts like Madonna, Girls Aloud & Adele, but can you recall who did the originals? Let's see!
10 hits from the 90s, including charity hits, movie songs, 2 number 1s & duets with George Michael, Kiki Dee, Luciano Pavarotti, LeAnn Rimes & RuPaul!
Time to draw the curtains, hold up the lighter and sing your heart out with the 40 greatest power ballads of the 90s!
The 00s was a hotbed of top talent, but who were the biggest pin-ups? Reminisce with the best - Robbie, Kylie, Rihanna, Justin & there's even room for Duncan and the boys from Blue.
Popcorn at the ready, these are the biggest songs from the movies. But don't forget to switch off your mobile phone!
Can you believe that 1994 delivered so many huge movie hits? Top songs from The Lion King, The Three Musketeers, Four Weddings, Reality Bites & more!
Popcorn at the ready, these are NOW's biggest songs from the movies. But don't forget to switch off your mobile phone!
The 80s & 90s were the golden decades for movie songs - but there were still a few in the 00s - some well remembered, and some not! Pat Sharp has found 25 - grab that popcorn.
Popcorn at the ready, these are NOW's biggest songs from the movies. But don't forget to switch off your mobile phone!
Get the tissues ready for 20 box office ballads! Starting in the 90's with a classic from the blockbuster Ghost through to Take That's epic Stardust anthem in the 00s!
Popcorn at the ready, these are NOW's biggest songs from the movies. But don't forget to switch off your mobile phone!
Bruno Brookes with the soundtrack of a decade - literally - the biggest UK movie songs of the 90s. Expect 007, Austin Powers, Romeo & Juliet, Robin Hood and those Men In Black!
Popcorn at the ready, these are NOW's biggest songs from the movies. But don't forget to switch off your mobile phone!
The 80s & 90s were the golden decades for movie songs - but there were still a few in the 00s - some well remembered, and some not! Here are 25, including 3 Bond themes.
Popcorn at the ready, these are the biggest songs from the movies. But don't forget to switch off your mobile phone!
Dave Grohl, Liam Gallagher, Steven Tyler, Michael Hutchence, Jon Bon Jovi, Lenny Kravitz are all here, as we celebrate the true masters of 90s rock and pop. But who's our No.1?
The loudest anthems in Party Rock, Pop Punk, Emo & Indie from the 90s & 00s. Expect Blink-182, Avril, Green Day, Nirvana, The Killers & much more!
Mark Goodier with a countdown of bands & artists who've had one rock song that has been viewed over a billion times since the 00s.
Every track a smash hit in the 90s or 00s, every video a UK chart number one. What more do you need for your weekend?
Oklahoma boys Isaac, Taylor & Zac choose 20 of their 90s favourites. Whitney Houston, Prince & Take That are all present - but standby for a few other surprises!
From secret glances of love in the classroom to a slow dance at the school disco. Not only were some of these pop pin ups, they also made the soundtrack to young love!
The biggest party songs & sing-out-loud anthems from the 90s & 00s to provide the perfect soundtrack to your weekend!
H, Claire, Lee, Lisa & Faye bring you 25 sexy videos from a classic decade of pop! With Britney, Janet, Kylie & Aqua, plus a couple of anthems from Steps themselves.
From divas of the dance floor to queens of the night! These 20 ladies have the sass, style & songs to take over & run this party!
The biggest party songs & sing-out-loud anthems from the 90s & 00s to provide the perfect soundtrack to your weekend!
Cheese lovers unite! Relive 1990-2009 with mozzarella melodies, brie-lliant chart-toppers and the cheesiest guilty pleasures around!
